messages.message: The ref value 'retryTimerRef.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'retryTimerRef.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a complex expression in the dependency array. Extract it to a separate variable so it can be statically checked.
The 'teachers' logical expression could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 101) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'teachers' in its own useMemo() Hook.

The 'termStats' logical expression could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 74) change on every render. Move it inside the useMemo callback. Alternatively, wrap the initialization of 'termStats' in its own useMemo() Hook.
The 'classes' conditional could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 76) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'classes' in its own useMemo() Hook.
